# Despezzas MCP

Despezzas MCP is an unofficial TypeScript MCP server for connecting personal financial data from Despezzas to MCP-compatible clients, including ChatGPT.

This project can read and change personal financial data. Agents must treat all credentials, sessions, API responses, HAR files, and transaction data as sensitive. Never commit `.env`, bearer tokens, passwords, Firebase session files, unredacted HARs, or real personal finance data.

## Core Context

- Package: `despezzas-mcp`
- Runtime: Node.js `>=20`
- Language: TypeScript, ESM
- License: MIT
- Default API base URL: `https://api.despezzas.com`
- Transports: local stdio, local Node HTTP at `/mcp`, Cloudflare Workers HTTP at `/mcp`
- Authentication: manual Despezzas bearer token, email/password with Firebase token exchange, or MCP OAuth for ChatGPT
- Recommended remote deployment: Cloudflare Workers

Despezzas does not publish an official API for this integration. Endpoints, payloads, and login details were inferred from web traffic and may change without notice.

## Development Provenance

This project was largely AI-assisted, or "vibecoded": most implementation work was generated, refactored, or iterated with AI agents, guided by Guilherme Milek's coding knowledge, product judgment, and manual review. Agents should treat the codebase as intentional but still verify behavior from source, tests, and runtime checks instead of assuming generated code is correct.

## Important Files

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): mandatory AI-agent workflow, safety rules, and verification guidance.
- [PROJECT_PATHS.md](PROJECT_PATHS.md): canonical local paths and sensitive/generated path notes.
- [README.md](README.md): main Portuguese user documentation.
- [README.en.md](README.en.md): English user documentation.
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): contribution rules and safety notes.
- [.env.example](.env.example): supported environment variables.
- [package.json](package.json): scripts, dependencies, package metadata.
- [src/index.ts](src/index.ts): CLI entrypoint; selects stdio or HTTP transport.
- [src/server.ts](src/server.ts): creates the MCP server and registers tools.
- [src/tools.ts](src/tools.ts): MCP tool schemas, handlers, validation, and write guards.
- [src/client.ts](src/client.ts): Despezzas API client and request helper.
- [src/auth.ts](src/auth.ts): Despezzas/Firebase authentication and session handling.
- [src/httpApp.ts](src/httpApp.ts): Express HTTP app, `/login`, OAuth discovery, `/oauth/*`, and `/mcp`.
- [src/cloudflare.ts](src/cloudflare.ts): Cloudflare Workers app, OAuth, multi-user session handling, and Worker logging.
- [src/oauth.ts](src/oauth.ts): MCP OAuth token, client, and authorization helpers.
- [src/cloudflareSessions.ts](src/cloudflareSessions.ts): encrypted Worker KV session storage.
- [src/config.ts](src/config.ts): environment-driven runtime configuration.
- [src/response.ts](src/response.ts): MCP JSON/error responses and confirmation guard.
- [src/types.ts](src/types.ts): shared TypeScript payload types.
- [test](test): Node test suite.
- [docs/agent-playbook.md](docs/agent-playbook.md): AI-agent preflight, ownership, verification, and stop rules.
- [docs/agent-task-template.md](docs/agent-task-template.md): reusable prompt template for AI-agent tasks.
- [docs/agent-architecture-map.md](docs/agent-architecture-map.md): source ownership map and change checklists.
- [docs/cloudflare-workers.md](docs/cloudflare-workers.md): Cloudflare Workers deployment.
- [docs/deployment.md](docs/deployment.md): Cloudflare-only deployment notes.
- [docs/chatgpt-app-setup.md](docs/chatgpt-app-setup.md): ChatGPT app/connector setup.

## Local Commands

Use these from the repository root:

```powershell
npm install
npm run check:repo-safety
npm run check:mcp-tools
npm run format:check
npm run lint
npm run build
npm run typecheck
npm test
npm run verify
```

Development:

```powershell
npm run dev
npm run dev:http
npm run dev:cloudflare
```

Runtime:

```powershell
npm run start
npm run start:http
```

Smoke testing:

```powershell
npm run smoke:readonly
```

`npm run smoke:readonly` requires working Despezzas authentication and calls only read-only endpoints.
`npm run verify` includes `format:check`; run `npm run format` before verification when changing formatted files.

## Environment Variables

Key variables:

- `DESPEZZAS_TOKEN`: optional manual bearer token.
- `DESPEZZAS_EMAIL`, `DESPEZZAS_PASSWORD`, `DESPEZZAS_FIREBASE_API_KEY`: optional email/password login and Firebase token exchange.
- `DESPEZZAS_SESSION_FILE`: persisted session path; use `none` to disable.
- `DESPEZZAS_API_BASE_URL`: Despezzas API base URL.
- `MCP_TRANSPORT`: `stdio` or `http`; default is `stdio`.
- `HOST`, `PORT`: HTTP bind address.
- `MCP_HTTP_BEARER_TOKEN`: optional shared bearer token for HTTP clients outside OAuth.
- `MCP_PUBLIC_BASE_URL`: public HTTPS base URL for OAuth metadata.
- `MCP_ALLOWED_HOSTS`: optional allowed Host header list.
- `MCP_OAUTH_TOKEN_SECRET`: stable signing secret for MCP OAuth access tokens.
- `MCP_OWNER_AUTH_CODE`: owner authorization code for private public deployments.
- `SESSION_ENCRYPTION_KEY`: required for multi-user Cloudflare Worker sessions.

Do not add real values for these variables to committed files.

## MCP Tools

Registered tool names:

- `despezzas_status`
- `despezzas_profile`
- `despezzas_list_profiles`
- `despezzas_switch_profile`
- `despezzas_create_profile`
- `despezzas_update_profile_access`
- `despezzas_delete_profile`
- `despezzas_leave_profile`
- `despezzas_personal_config`
- `despezzas_list_accounts`
- `despezzas_list_banks`
- `despezzas_create_account`
- `despezzas_update_account`
- `despezzas_delete_account`
- `despezzas_list_credit_cards`
- `despezzas_create_credit_card`
- `despezzas_update_credit_card`
- `despezzas_delete_credit_card`
- `despezzas_list_categories`
- `despezzas_list_subcategories`
- `despezzas_search_transactions`
- `despezzas_transaction_overview`
- `despezzas_finance_summary`
- `despezzas_prepare_create_transaction`
- `despezzas_create_transaction`
- `despezzas_prepare_update_transaction`
- `despezzas_update_transaction`
- `despezzas_batch_update_transactions`
- `despezzas_prepare_delete_transaction`
- `despezzas_delete_transaction`
- `despezzas_duplicate_transaction`
- `despezzas_toggle_transaction_paid`
- `despezzas_create_transfer`
- `despezzas_export_transactions`
- `despezzas_raw_api`

Write or destructive tools must keep requiring `confirm: true`. Transaction writes should continue to prefer prepare tools first, then confirmed write tools after payload review.

## Agent Guidelines

- Keep changes small and reviewable because this integration touches financial data and undocumented APIs.
- Read `AGENTS.md` and `docs/agent-playbook.md` before non-trivial changes.
- Preserve the `confirm: true` safety requirement for every write or destructive operation.
- Add focused tests for new tool payload validation, dangerous write paths, and ambiguous transaction/account/card behavior.
- Keep the MCP tool catalog synchronized with `src/tools.ts`; `npm run check:mcp-tools` validates `llms.txt` and documented `despezzas_*` references.
- Prefer existing helpers in `src/response.ts`, `src/client.ts`, `src/auth.ts`, and `src/tools.ts` over introducing parallel patterns.
- Use integer cents for money values. Example: `12345` means `R$123.45`.
- Use `YYYY-MM-DD` dates for tool inputs.
- Do not pass Despezzas passwords as MCP tool arguments. Use `.env` or the `/login` page.
- Do not log secrets, raw Authorization headers, Firebase refresh tokens, full sessions, or unredacted API responses.
- When capturing new endpoints, use `npm run inspect:har -- path/to/file.har` and still manually review redaction before sharing.

## Deployment Notes

- Local stdio clients should run the built `dist/index.js`.
- Remote deployment is Cloudflare Workers only.
- Node HTTP mode is available for local development and private HTTP use, not as a documented remote deployment path.
- ChatGPT OAuth should use the public Cloudflare Worker URL or a custom domain configured with `MCP_PUBLIC_BASE_URL`.
- Cloudflare Workers deployment is configured by `wrangler.jsonc` and `src/cloudflare.ts`.
- Cloudflare multi-user mode requires Workers KV binding `DESPEZZAS_SESSIONS` plus `SESSION_ENCRYPTION_KEY`.
- Single-account public deployments should set `MCP_OWNER_AUTH_CODE`.

## Useful References

- [Model Context Protocol](https://modelcontextprotocol.io/)
- [Despezzas](https://despezzas.com/)
- [Cloudflare Workers](https://workers.cloudflare.com/)
